description_long: This is a small, rounded ceramic cup with a slightly irregular rim and visible chips and wear, suggesting age or frequent use. The exterior is decorated with a hand-painted floral or botanical motif in dark green and brown hues, with some areas showing faded or worn paint. The surface has a glossy, glazed finish, giving it a reflective sheen and a hard tactile quality. The cup's body is thick and robust, with no visible handle or lid, and the interior appears to be similarly glazed. There are some visible cracks and imperfections, indicating it may be an antique or well-used item. The cup is compact and would typically be used for drinking tea or similar beverages.
description: A small, rounded, chipped ceramic cup with a glossy floral pattern and no handle or lid, showing signs of age and wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the most detailed floral artwork and visible chips along the rim.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the cup's rounded shape and faded decorative pattern with less visible damage.
description_view_2: Back view reveals more of the cup's surface wear and a less distinct pattern, with visible cracks.
description_view_3: Another side view showing a different section of the floral motif and additional rim imperfections.
